testcase.name: getFeatureFlagValue — percentage flagType routing (AC-1) > percentage 0% → 所有 userId 返回 false
getFeatureFlagValue — percentage flagType routing (AC-1) > percentage 100% → 所有 userId 返回 true
getFeatureFlagValue — percentage flagType routing (AC-1) > percentage 50% → deterministic · 同 userId×flagKey 多次一致 (AC-1)
getFeatureFlagValue — percentage flagType routing (AC-1) > percentage: userId 缺失 → false (无 userId 无法分流)
getFeatureFlagValue — targeted flagType routing (AC-2) > targeted: userId in target_users → true
getFeatureFlagValue — targeted flagType routing (AC-2) > targeted: plan in target_plans → true
getFeatureFlagValue — targeted flagType routing (AC-2) > targeted: userId 不在 + plan 不在 → false
getFeatureFlagValue — boolean flagType routing > boolean flagType: defaultValue=true → true
getFeatureFlagValue — boolean flagType routing > boolean flagType: defaultValue=false → false
toggleFeatureFlag — 任意 flagKey upsert + dual approval (AC-4) > 未知 flagKey → 不抛 NOT_FOUND · 创建 dual approval request
toggleFeatureFlag — 任意 flagKey upsert + dual approval (AC-4) > 已知 flagKey + valid rolloutConfig(percentage) → approval request
toggleFeatureFlag — 任意 flagKey upsert + dual approval (AC-4) > invalid rolloutConfig (非 discriminatedUnion) → zod 校验抛错 (AC-3)
rolloutConfigSchema — discriminatedUnion 严格校验 (AC-3) > boolean: { flagType: "boolean" } → valid
rolloutConfigSchema — discriminatedUnion 严格校验 (AC-3) > percentage: { flagType: "percentage", percentage: 50 } → valid
rolloutConfigSchema — discriminatedUnion 严格校验 (AC-3) > targeted: { flagType: "targeted", target_users: [1,2], target_plans: ["pro"] } → valid
rolloutConfigSchema — discriminatedUnion 严格校验 (AC-3) > percentage out of range: percentage=101 → zod 抛错
rolloutConfigSchema — discriminatedUnion 严格校验 (AC-3) > targeted: 非法 plan → zod 抛错
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > boolean branch > { flagType: "boolean" } → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > boolean branch > boolean + extra keys → 不通过(strict)
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > percentage branch > percentage=0 → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > percentage branch > percentage=100 → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > percentage branch > percentage=-1 → 失败
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > percentage branch > percentage=101 → 失败
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > percentage branch > percentage 缺失 → 失败
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > targeted branch > target_users + target_plans → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > targeted branch > 仅 target_users(optional target_plans) → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > targeted branch > 仅 target_plans(optional target_users) → 通过
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > targeted branch > 非法 plan("basic") → 失败
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > targeted branch > target_users 含浮点数 → 失败
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > unknown flagType > flagType="custom" → 失败(discriminatedUnion 只允许 3 分支)
rolloutConfigSchema — zod discriminatedUnion 完整校验 (AC-3) > unknown flagType > 无 flagType → 失败
percentage hash 确定性 (AC-1 · SHIELD) > 同 userId×flagKey 多次调 → 同 bucket
percentage hash 确定性 (AC-1 · SHIELD) > 不同 userId → 大概率不同 bucket(非随机)
percentage hash 确定性 (AC-1 · SHIELD) > hash input 顺序: userId:flagKey (非 flagKey:userId)
_toggleFeatureFlagInTx — upsert 支持任意 flagKey (AC-4) > 新 flagKey: upsert.create 被调用 · flagType 默认 boolean
_toggleFeatureFlagInTx — upsert 支持任意 flagKey (AC-4) > percentage flagType: upsert.create.flagType = "percentage"
